channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.118】Visual Studio 代码 1.118
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.118 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.118 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Azure MCP Server now available as an MCP Bundle (.mcpb)】Azure MCP 服务器现在作为 MCP 捆绑包 (.mcpb) 提供
item.description: 【We're excited to announce that the Azure MCP Server is now available as an MCP Bundle (.mcpb). This means you can install the Azure MCP Server into Claude Desktop and other MCP-compatible clients】我们很高兴地宣布，Azure MCP 服务器现已作为 MCP 捆绑包 (.mcpb) 提供。这意味着您可以将 Azure MCP 服务器安装到 Claude Desktop 和其他 MCP 兼容客户端中

item.title: 【Chat History Storage Patterns in Microsoft Agent Framework】Microsoft Agent Framework 中的聊天历史记录存储模式
item.description: 【When people talk about building AI agents, they usually focus on models, tools, and prompts. In practice, one of the most important architectural decisions is much simpler: where does the conversation history live? Imagine a user asks your agent a complex question, clicks “try again,” explores tw】当人们谈论构建人工智能代理时，他们通常关注模型、工具和提示。在实践中，最重要的架构决策之一要简单得多：对话历史记录位于哪里？想象一下，用户向您的代理询问一个复杂的问题，单击“重试”，然后探索两个问题

item.title: 【Defending against exceptions in a scope_exit RAII type】防御 scope_exit RAII 类型中的异常
item.description: 【One of the handy helpers in the Windows Implementation Library (WIL) is wil::scope_exit. We've used it to】Windows 实现库 (WIL) 中方便的助手之一是 wil::scope_exit。我们已经用它来

item.title: 【Axios npm Supply Chain Compromise – Guidance for Azure Pipelines Customers】Axios npm 供应链妥协 – Azure Pipelines 客户指南
item.description: 【On March 31, 2026, malicious versions of the widely used JavaScript HTTP client library Axios were briefly published to the npm registry as part of a supply chain attack. The affected versions — 1.14.1 and 0.30.4 — included a hidden malicious dependency】2026 年 3 月 31 日，作为供应链攻击的一部分，广泛使用的 JavaScript HTTP 客户端库 Axios 的恶意版本被短暂发布到 npm 注册表。受影响的版本 - 1.14.1 和 0.30.4 - 包含隐藏的恶意依赖项

item.title: 【What's new for .NET in Ubuntu 26.04】Ubuntu 26.04 中 .NET 的新增功能
item.description: 【Today is launch day for Ubuntu 26.04 (Resolute Raccoon). Congratulations on the release to our friends at Canonical. Each new Ubuntu LTS comes with the latest .NET LTS so that you ca】今天是 Ubuntu 26.04 (Resolute Raccoon) 的发布日。祝贺 Canonical 的朋友们发布了该版本。每个新的 Ubuntu LTS 都附带最新的 .NET LTS，以便您可以

item.title: 【LangChain.js for Beginners: A Free Course to Build Agentic AI Apps with JavaScript】LangChain.js 初学者：使用 JavaScript 构建代理 AI 应用程序的免费课程
item.description: 【Want to build AI agents with JavaScript that go beyond basic chat completions? Agents that reason, call tools, and pull from knowledge bases on their own? We put together a free, open source course to help you get there. LangChain.js for Beginners is 8 cha】想要使用 JavaScript 构建超越基本聊天完成功能的 AI 代理吗？智能体能够自行推理、调用工具并从知识库中提取信息？我们整理了一个免费的开源课程来帮助您实现这一目标。 LangChain.js 初学者版 8 章

item.title: 【General Availability: Single Sign-On (SSO) from Native Apps to Embedded Web Views in Microsoft Entra External ID Native Authentication】全面上市：从本机应用程序到 Microsoft Entra 外部 ID 本机身份验证中的嵌入式 Web 视图的单点登录 (SSO)
item.description: 【We’re excited to announce the General Availability (GA) of Single Sign-On (SSO) from Native Apps to Embedded Web Views for Microsoft Entra External ID (EEID) Native Authentication. This release marks a major milestone in delivering end-to-end seamless authentication experiences for modern CIAM applications bridging the gap between】我们很高兴地宣布，从本机应用程序到嵌入式 Web 视图的单点登录 (SSO) 全面可用 (GA)，以实现 Microsoft Entra 外部 ID (EEID) 本机身份验证。此版本标志着为现代 CIAM 应用程序提供端到端无缝身份验证体验的一个重要里程碑，弥合了

item.title: 【CodeAct in Agent Framework: Faster Agents with Fewer Model Turns】Agent 框架中的 CodeAct：更快的代理，更少的模型轮次
item.description: 【Modern AI agents often aren't bottlenecked by model quality, they are bottlenecked by orchestration overhead. When an agent chains together many small tool calls, each step typically requires a new model turn, driving up latency and token usage. With CodeAct sup】现代人工智能代理通常不会受到模型质量的瓶颈，而是会受到编排开销的瓶颈。当代理将许多小工具调用链接在一起时，每个步骤通常都需要一个新的模型转变，从而增加延迟和令牌使用。通过 CodeAct 支持

item.title: 【Another crash caused by uninstaller code injection into Explorer】卸载程序代码注入资源管理器导致的另一次崩溃
item.description: 【Some time ago, I noted that any sufficiently advanced uninstaller is indistinguishable from malware.¹ During one of our regular debugging chats, a colleague of mine mentione】前一段时间，我注意到任何足够先进的卸载程序都与恶意软件无法区分。在我们的一次定期调试聊天中，我的一位同事提到
